requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — AZS / IEC 62368-1 for 220 V / 50 Hz European-Plug Grid (Type C/F)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——针对220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电网的AZS / IEC 62368-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——針對220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電網的AZS / IEC 62368-1

summary.en: Azerbaijan operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical grid, a legacy of the Soviet-era electrical infrastructure retained after independence. Plug types in use are Type C (Europlug, two round pins) and Type F (Schuko, two round pins with earthing clips) — the same European and CIS-standard plug forms used across the post-Soviet region. Electrical safety for electronic and electrical equipment placed on the Azerbaijan market is governed by applicable AzStandard (AZS) national standards. The relevant safety standard for audio/video, information technology, and communication technology equipment is the AZS adoption of IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements), which has globally superseded the earlier IEC 60950-1. Azerbaijan's AZS standards in the electrical safety domain draw from GOST IEC standards (inherited from the CIS technical framework) and are increasingly aligned with direct IEC adoptions. Mains-connected wireless and IoT consumer devices with power supplies operating at 220 V / 50 Hz are within scope. Conformity must be demonstrated through test reports from recognised laboratories, and the evidence submitted as part of the ICTA type approval or AzStandard conformity assessment dossier. Chinese devices designed for 220 V have a voltage compatibility advantage, but plug configuration (Type A/I in China versus Type C/F in Azerbaijan) and certification framework differences require separate assessment and possible product adaptation.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆使用220V/50Hz电网，这是独立后延续的苏联时代电气基础设施遗产。使用的插头类型为C型（欧标插头，两个圆形插脚）和F型（Schuko，两个圆形插脚附接地夹）——与后苏联地区通行的欧洲和独联体标准插头形式相同。投放阿塞拜疆市场的电子和电气设备的电气安全受适用的AzStandard（AZS）国家标准约束。适用于音视频、信息技术及通信技术设备的相关安全标准为IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备——安全要求）的AZS采用版，该标准已在全球取代早期的IEC 60950-1。阿塞拜疆电气安全领域的AZS标准源自GOST IEC标准（继承自独联体技术框架），并日益与直接采用IEC标准接轨。具有220V/50Hz电源的有线连接无线及物联网消费类设备在适用范围内。须通过经认可实验室的测试报告证明合规，并作为ICTA型号核准或AzStandard合格评定材料的一部分提交。为220V设计的中国设备具有电压兼容优势，但插头配置（中国为A/I型，阿塞拜疆为C/F型）和认证框架差异需要进行独立评估和可能的产品适配。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然使用220V/50Hz電網，這是獨立後延續的蘇聯時代電氣基礎設施遺產。使用的插頭類型為C型（歐標插頭，兩個圓形插腳）和F型（Schuko，兩個圓形插腳附接地夾）——與後蘇聯地區通行的歐洲和獨聯體標準插頭形式相同。投放亞塞拜然市場的電子和電氣設備的電氣安全受適用的AzStandard（AZS）國家標準約束。適用於音視頻、信息技術及通信技術設備的相關安全標準為IEC 62368-1（音視頻、信息和通信技術設備——安全要求）的AZS採用版，該標準已在全球取代早期的IEC 60950-1。亞塞拜然電氣安全領域的AZS標準源自GOST IEC標準（繼承自獨聯體技術框架），並日益與直接採用IEC標準接軌。具有220V/50Hz電源的有線連接無線及物聯網消費類設備在適用範圍內。須通過經認可實驗室的測試報告證明合規，並作為ICTA型號核准或AzStandard合格評定材料的一部分提交。為220V設計的中國設備具有電壓相容優勢，但插頭配置（中國為A/I型，亞塞拜然為C/F型）和認證框架差異需要進行獨立評估和可能的產品適配。

standards_or_laws: AZS adoption of IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (AZS national standard, adopted from IEC 62368-1 via GOST IEC 62368-1 lineage)
Azerbaijan grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type C (Europlug, CEE 7/16) and F (Schuko, CEE 7/4) — Soviet-era and European standard sockets

ICTA (Information and Communications Technologies Agency of Azerbaijan) — requires electrical safety conformity evidence as part of type approval dossier for mains-connected telecom and radio terminal equipment

summary.en: China's mandatory electrical safety standard for information technology equipment is GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1), enforced through CCC certification. A newer standard GB/T 42315 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) has been published as China transitions away from IEC 60950-1. China uses a 220 V / 50 Hz grid (voltage-compatible with Azerbaijan) but uses Type A (flat two-pin) and Type I (oblique flat three-pin) plugs, which are different from Azerbaijan's Type C/F. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 does not substitute for Azerbaijan AZS IEC 62368-1 conformity. Products must be adapted for Type C/F plug format for the Azerbaijan market, and new safety testing against the AZS adoption of IEC 62368-1 by an ICTA-recognised laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术设备的强制性电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1接轨），通过CCC认证执行。更新版标准GB/T 42315（与IEC 62368-1接轨）已随中国从IEC 60950-1过渡而发布。中国使用220V/50Hz电网（与阿塞拜疆电压兼容），但使用A型（扁平两脚）和I型（斜扁平三脚）插头，与阿塞拜疆C/F型不同。基于GB 4943.1的CCC电气安全认证不可替代阿塞拜疆AZS IEC 62368-1合规。产品须适配C/F型插头以进入阿塞拜疆市场，并须由ICTA认可的实验室按AZS采用的IEC 62368-1进行新的安全测试。
summary.zht: 中國信息技術設備的強制性電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1接軌），通過CCC認證執行。更新版標準GB/T 42315（與IEC 62368-1接軌）已隨中國從IEC 60950-1過渡而發布。中國使用220V/50Hz電網（與亞塞拜然電壓相容），但使用A型（扁平兩腳）和I型（斜扁平三腳）插頭，與亞塞拜然C/F型不同。基於GB 4943.1的CCC電氣安全認證不可替代亞塞拜然AZS IEC 62368-1合規。產品須適配C/F型插頭以進入亞塞拜然市場，並須由ICTA認可的實驗室按AZS採用的IEC 62368-1進行新的安全測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment — Part 1: General requirements (CCC mandatory, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 42315 — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1; adoption and CCC mandate timeline to be verified with CNCA)
China grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type A (flat two-pin, AS 3112 variant) and I (oblique flat three-pin)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1 / IEC 60950-1 lineage) does not substitute for Azerbaijan AZS conformity under IEC 62368-1. While China and Azerbaijan both use 220 V / 50 Hz, the plug standard differs (Type A/I in China; Type C/F in Azerbaijan), requiring product adaptation for plug configuration. The conformity assessment must be conducted against the AZS adoption of IEC 62368-1 by a laboratory recognised by ICTA or AzStandard. Electrical safety conformity evidence must be included in the ICTA type approval submission dossier. The transition from IEC 60950-1 to IEC 62368-1 is global but new test reports to the AZS version are required regardless of prior Chinese testing history.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1 / IEC 60950-1标准系）不可替代AZS采用IEC 62368-1标准下的阿塞拜疆合规。尽管中国和阿塞拜疆均使用220V/50Hz，但插头标准不同（中国为A/I型，阿塞拜疆为C/F型），需对插头配置进行产品适配。合格评定须由ICTA或AzStandard认可的实验室按AZS采用的IEC 62368-1标准进行。电气安全合规证据须纳入ICTA型号核准申请材料。从IEC 60950-1向IEC 62368-1的过渡是全球性的，但无论先前的中国测试历史如何，均须提交针对AZS版本的新测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1 / IEC 60950-1標準系）不可替代AZS採用IEC 62368-1標準下的亞塞拜然合規。儘管中國和亞塞拜然均使用220V/50Hz，但插頭標準不同（中國為A/I型，亞塞拜然為C/F型），需對插頭配置進行產品適配。合格評定須由ICTA或AzStandard認可的實驗室按AZS採用的IEC 62368-1標準進行。電氣安全合規證據須納入ICTA型號核准申請材料。從IEC 60950-1向IEC 62368-1的過渡是全球性的，但無論先前的中國測試歷史如何，均須提交針對AZS版本的新測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformity against AZS / IEC 62368-1 required for mains-connected wireless and IoT devices sold in Azerbaijan; Type C/F plug adaptation required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 aligned) required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China; transition to GB/T 42315 (IEC 62368-1 aligned) underway

source.publisher: AzStandard — Azerbaijan Standards Institute (Azərbaycan Standartlaşdırma İnstitutu)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity against the AZS adoption of IEC 62368-1 is required for mains-connected wireless and IoT devices sold in Azerbaijan. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification does not substitute. Products must also adapt plug configuration from Chinese Type A/I to Azerbaijan Type C/F. Electrical safety test reports from ICTA-recognised laboratories against AZS / IEC 62368-1 must be included in the ICTA type approval submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿塞拜疆销售的市电连接无线及物联网设备，须符合AZS采用的IEC 62368-1电气安全合规要求。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不可替代。产品还须将插头配置从中国A/I型适配为阿塞拜疆C/F型。ICTA认可实验室按AZS / IEC 62368-1出具的电气安全测试报告须纳入ICTA型号核准申请材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在亞塞拜然銷售的市電連接無線及物聯網設備，須符合AZS採用的IEC 62368-1電氣安全合規要求。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不可替代。產品還須將插頭配置從中國A/I型適配為亞塞拜然C/F型。ICTA認可實驗室按AZS / IEC 62368-1出具的電氣安全測試報告須納入ICTA型號核准申請材料。
